reasoning: User asked for cherry blossom spots in Tohoku (in Spanish). Response is Akita-only (one prefecture of Tohoku) and surfaces 田沢湖, 鳥海山, fireworks, and Kakunodate samurai district. Only Kakunodate is sakura-tagged (sakura_meisho_100); other items are noise. Cherry intent is barely addressed — sakura items buried by lake/mountain/fireworks.
missing_data: Other Tohoku prefectures (Aomori 弘前, Iwate 北上, Miyagi 白石川堤, Yamagata, Fukushima 三春滝桜); explicit ranking of sakura_meisho_100 entries first.
improvement_hint: When intent is clearly seasonal (cherry/桜), filter or rank by sakura_meisho_100 / kind:sakura kind tag and aggregate across the requested region (Tohoku) rather than a single prefecture.

reasoning: Niigata sake breweries query well-served: Koshi-no-Sanbai trio (越乃寒梅, 八海山, 久保田) and other sake brands surfaced from Wikidata, plus MAFF GI items mixed in. Names, brewers, locations and source URLs are present. Slight mix-in of non-sake GI items (Kurosaki Chamame) is minor noise.
missing_data: Brewery addresses, visit/tour info, and English names for some items would lift practical use.
improvement_hint: Allow `category=sake` or `kind_tags=sake_brewery` filtering to drop edamame/non-sake GI noise from a sake-specific query.

reasoning: User (in French) asked for Hakuba ski resorts WITH onsen. Response correctly returns Happo-One ski resort and other Hakuba spots, but does not pair ski + onsen — onsen entries are not surfaced near the top. Constraint of combined ski+onsen not handled; visit-time-only data, no onsen overlap.
missing_data: Hakuba area onsen (e.g. 白馬八方温泉, 白馬塩の道温泉, 白馬みずばしょう温泉) and ski-resort×nearby-onsen joining.
improvement_hint: Support multi-kind intersection (kind=ski_resort AND nearby kind=onsen) or surface onsen explicitly when query mentions ski+onsen.

reasoning: User asked Kansai-wide autumn foliage spots. Response is Kyoto-only (one prefecture) and returns generic top temples (Nijo, Toji, Sanzen-in, Ine fishing village). Only Sanzen-in/三千院 is a famous momiji spot among the visible items; foliage tag not used to rank. Misses 嵐山, 東福寺, 清水寺 etc.
missing_data: Famous momiji spots (東福寺, 嵐山, 清水寺, 大原三千院, 永観堂, 高雄), and other Kansai prefectures (Nara, Wakayama, Hyogo, Shiga).
improvement_hint: For 'Kansai 紅葉' style queries, expand region to all six Kansai prefectures and rank by kouyou_meisho / autumn_foliage kind tag.

reasoning: Arabic query for Kansai cherry blossom spots. Response correctly surfaces 吉野山 (sakura_meisho_100, world-famous cherry mountain) at top, plus 奈良公園 (also famous for cherry). 高松塚 and 興福寺 are noise but high-quality cultural sites. Single-prefecture coverage (Nara) again limits Kansai breadth, but the top hit is excellent.
missing_data: Other Kansai sakura sites (醍醐寺, 哲学の道, 姫路城, 造幣局桜の通り抜け).
improvement_hint: Multi-prefecture aggregation when the query targets a region (Kansai) rather than a single prefecture.

reasoning: User asked specifically for stargazing spots in Okinawa's remote islands. Response returns Naha cultural sites (Nakagusuku, Tamaudun, Shikina-en) and Taketomi island. Stargazing constraint completely unaddressed; remote-island filter only weakly satisfied via Taketomi. No reference to Iriomote, Hateruma, Ishigaki dark-sky parks.
missing_data: Hateruma-jima (southernmost dark-sky), Iriomote, Ishigaki, Iriomote-Ishigaki National Park dark-sky designation, kind=dark_sky / starry tags.
improvement_hint: Add dark-sky / 星空 kind tag to data layer and prioritize remote-island (離島) entries when query mentions stars/離島.

reasoning: Thai query: countryside onsen lodging in Hokkaido. Response leads with 4 hito_yu_kai (秘湯) ryokan — exactly matching the rural-onsen intent — including 知内温泉 (oldest in Hokkaido), 銀婚湯, 凌雲閣 (highest), 湧駒荘 (Asahidake). Excellent match. ANA Holiday Inn at the bottom is noise but harmless.
missing_data: Coordinates and websites are null for several hito_yu_kai entries (looks like address-only data).
improvement_hint: Backfill coordinates / phone / website for hito_yu_kai entries via geocoding to lift practicality.

reasoning: Vietnamese query for Seto Inland Sea islands worth visiting. Tool returned only Kagawa, and surfaced mainland sites (Ritsurin, 満濃池, 丸亀城, 高松城) — not the famous art islands (Naoshima, Teshima, Shodoshima). Island intent buried.
missing_data: Naoshima (Q821681), Teshima, Shodoshima, Ogijima — all in Kagawa and core to Seto art-island intent. Ehime/Hiroshima islands (Omishima, Innoshima).
improvement_hint: For 'Seto Inland Sea islands' add region-wide aggregation across Kagawa+Okayama+Hiroshima+Ehime and rank kind=island first.

reasoning: User asked for indigo dyeing workshops in Tokushima. Response returns 3 METI traditional crafts: 阿波正藍しじら織 (indigo, on-target), 大谷焼 (off-topic ceramics), 阿波和紙 (mentions indigo). Only one of three is on-topic. No workshop venue info — only craft designations.
missing_data: 藍の館 (Aizumi Historical Museum / indigo workshop), AOZORA dye atelier, BUAISOU experiences — actual hands-on workshop venues.
improvement_hint: Add a venue/workshop layer that links craft designations to physical experience locations (museums, ateliers, taiken dojo).

reasoning: German query for Buddhist shukubo on Mount Koya. Response is squarely on target: 安養院, 一乗院, 惠光院, 北室院, 熊谷寺 — all confirmed members of Koyasan Shukubo Association with phone numbers and shukubo.net URLs. Excellent match.
missing_data: name_en is null on all entries; coordinates null.
improvement_hint: Translate names + add coordinates for Koyasan shukubo entries to lift specificity and English usability.

reasoning: Search for samurai districts (off-the-beaten-path, outside Kyoto). Response surfaces non-Kyoto buke yashiki: Matsue 武家屋敷 (Shimane), 旧内山家 (Fukui), 角館 (Akita, top-tier weeping cherry), 知覧 (Kagoshima), 会津 (Fukushima) — ideal coverage of regional samurai districts. 148 matches signal good corpus.
missing_data: More descriptive English text for some entries (Buke Yashiki / Q11545900 desc null).
improvement_hint: Backfill English description for less-translated buke_yashiki entities; rank by prominence_score for traveler-facing answers.

reasoning: Indonesian query for Akita summer festivals. Response returned only 3 bunka_intangible items (Dainichido Bugaku — January, Kakunodate Festival — September, Tsuchizaki Shinmei — July). The signature Akita summer festivals (竿燈まつり in early August, 大曲花火 in August) are entirely missing from items. Translation to Indonesian is good. Coverage failure on intent.
missing_data: Akita Kanto Festival (秋田竿燈まつり), 大曲全国花火競技大会, Hanawa Festival, 西馬音内盆踊 — these are the canonical summer festivals.
improvement_hint: Festival data ingest should include modern matsuri / hanabi events for Akita, not only intangible cultural property entries.

reasoning: Korean query for small port towns in San'in region. Response returns Shimane prominent attractions (宍道湖, 松江城, 石見銀山, 三瓶山) — none are 漁港 / port towns. Constraint completely unmet; categories are lake/castle/mine/mountain.
missing_data: 美保関, 浜田漁港, 温泉津, 江津 fishing villages; preservation district 温泉津 (Yunotsu).
improvement_hint: Need a kind=fishing_port / 漁港 filter and surface coastal preservation districts (温泉津) when port-town intent is detected.

reasoning: User asked where to experience washi paper-making in Gifu. Response returns Gifu craft list: 美濃焼 (ceramics), 飛騨春慶 (lacquer), 南木曽ろくろ (wood), 一位一刀彫 (carving) — but the iconic 本美濃紙 (Hon-Minoshi, UNESCO) is not in the visible truncation despite count=8. Likely included further down. Need experience venues.
missing_data: 美濃和紙の里会館 (Mino Washi Museum), 本美濃紙 designation visible in top entries, hands-on workshop venues.
improvement_hint: Rank washi entries first when query mentions washi/paper; link craft → workshop/museum experience venues.

reasoning: Spanish query: fishing villages on Noto Peninsula. Response returns Kanazawa-area sights (金沢城, 兼六園, Bed and Craft in Toyama-Inami, 七尾城). Bed and Craft is interesting (kominka) but is in Toyama, not Noto fishing villages. Noto fishing-village intent missed.
missing_data: Wajima (輪島朝市), 蒲生鵜飼, 舳倉島, 珠洲市 fishing villages, 白米千枚田.
wrong_data: Bed and Craft entry lists prefecture 石川県 but coordinates point to Toyama Inami area — slight prefecture/coord mismatch.
improvement_hint: Surface Noto-peninsula coastal municipalities (Wajima, Suzu, Noto, Anamizu) when Noto/fishing-village intent detected; add kind=fishing_port.

reasoning: Sand dunes outside Tottori — search returns 88 matches and surfaces Tottori first (acceptable as canonical) plus Onjuku Beach (Chiba), Ishikari (Hokkaido), Fukiagehama (Kagoshima), Tsujido (Kanagawa) — exactly the 'lesser-known' coverage requested. Good answer.
missing_data: Nakatajima (Shizuoka), 庄内砂丘 (Yamagata), 内灘砂丘 (Ishikawa).
improvement_hint: De-prioritize Tottori (or flag as 'canonical') when query says 'not just Tottori' — small re-rank lever.

reasoning: Chinese query for traditional crafts of San'in (Shimane). Response returns 4 METI-designated crafts: 石見焼, 石州和紙, 雲州そろばん, 出雲石燈ろう — all on-target with high-quality Chinese translations and production area text. Excellent.
missing_data: Tottori (山陰 includes both Shimane+Tottori) — the response is Shimane-only.
improvement_hint: For region-style queries (山陰), aggregate Shimane + Tottori prefectures instead of using only one.

reasoning: User asked for Hokkaido lavender fields beyond Furano. Response returns 昭和新山, 札幌時計台, 松前城, 大雪山 — none are lavender fields. Constraint entirely missed. Hokkaido data has Tomita Farm, Kamifurano, Nakafurano lavender — but kind tag is missing.
missing_data: Tomita Farm (ファーム富田), 中富良野, 上富良野ラベンダー, 北見, さっぽろラベンダー — kind=lavender_field tag missing.
improvement_hint: Add a 'lavender' / flower-field kind tag for Hokkaido farm entries; without it, intent-classified queries cannot retrieve.

reasoning: Filipino query: 'traditional kape towns in Kyushu' — likely intended 'old town/traditional villages'. Response returns generic Oita sights (宇佐神宮, 岡城, 九重町観光協会, 九重山). 九重町観光協会 entry has its description (general muni info) inaccurately tagged with municipality 日田市 + tier must_see — looks like a poor scrape blob, not a town. Intent of 'traditional towns' is missed.
missing_data: 杵築 (Kitsuki) jokamachi, 日田豆田町 (preservation district), 臼杵 — Oita's actual old-town stock.
wrong_data: 九重町観光協会 entry has municipality=日田市 but the org is for 九重町 — municipality mismatch in data.
improvement_hint: Fix the 九重町観光協会 record's municipality field; rank kind=preservation_district / 重伝建 first when 'old town' intent.

reasoning: User asked for kominka (traditional house) lodging in Hokuriku. Response returns hito_yu_kai onsen ryokan (永井, にしやま) plus an OSM 'Student housing 1' (clearly mis-classified) and 'AB HOTEL'. None are kominka stays. Bed and Craft (which appeared in L2-20 context) would be the right answer but is absent here.
missing_data: Bed and Craft (Inami, Toyama-side but Hokuriku), 加賀の伝統的家屋 stays, kominka_stay kind filtering.
wrong_data: OSM 'Student housing 1' surfaced as a hotel — clearly a data-quality issue (student dorm, not lodging).
improvement_hint: Filter student housing / dormitories from get_hotels; add kominka_stay kind and surface region-wide (Toyama-Ishikawa-Fukui) when Hokuriku queried.

reasoning: Mountain shrines on the Kii Peninsula — response correctly surfaces 金剛峯寺, 根来寺, 熊野古道 (UNESCO), 熊野三山 (UNESCO core) at top via top_canonical_heritage. Strong match for mountain pilgrimage / shrine intent. Good metadata.
missing_data: 吉野・大峯 (奈良 side of Kii peninsula), 玉置神社, 高野山 detail.
improvement_hint: For 'Kii peninsula' queries, also pull Nara (Yoshino-Omine) and Mie heritage rows in addition to Wakayama.

reasoning: User asked for summer fireworks along Sea of Japan coast. Response returns 129 Niigata festivals, the visible top 4 are 芝桜まつり (May), ヒメサユリ祭り (May), 長岡まつり大花火大会 (Aug — bullseye), カナール彩 (likely fireworks). 長岡花火 is included but only ranked third; non-fireworks events are not filtered out.
missing_data: description_en / English translations are null in visible items (only ja). Other Sea-of-Japan coast prefectures (Akita 大曲, Toyama, Ishikawa, Tottori, Shimane) not aggregated.
wrong_data: municipality field on several entries is '新潟市' even when the event is in Nagaoka or Uonuma — incorrect muni mapping.
improvement_hint: Filter by event_type/keyword 'fireworks/花火' when intent is fireworks; fix municipality assignment for scraped events; aggregate Sea-of-Japan-coast prefectures.

reasoning: Bamboo crafts in Oita — response returns 別府竹細工 (Beppu Bamboo Crafts, METI-designated, exactly the canonical answer) with detailed English translation, plus 博多織 (Fukuoka/Saga/Oita textiles, secondary relevance). Top hit is excellent.
missing_data: Beppu Bamboo Crafts Center / 別府市竹細工伝統産業会館 venue link; workshop experience info.
improvement_hint: Link crafts to physical museum/workshop venues so a traveler can act on the answer.

reasoning: Cycling in rural Shikoku — response returns Ehime castles (Ozu, Yuzuki, Uwajima) and Omishima (kinds includes cycling_route — perfect for Shimanami Kaido). Castles are noise but Omishima is on-target. Could rank cycling_route first.
missing_data: しまなみ海道 (Shimanami Kaido) explicit entry, 大三島's other islands (生口島, 因島), Tokushima 四国一周 routes.
improvement_hint: When kind=cycling_route present, rank those entries above castles / general spots.

reasoning: User asked where to see kabuki outside Tokyo/Kyoto. Response returns 183 traditional arts entries; visible top are Bunraku, Kabuki (definition), Chakkirako, Dainichido Bugaku, Hayachine Kagura. UNESCO definition entries surfaced but no actual venues (金丸座 in Kotohira, 内子座, 永楽館 etc.). Intent of 'where to see' (theatre venues) is missed.
missing_data: Theatre venues — 旧金毘羅大芝居 (金丸座, Kotohira), 内子座 (Ehime), 八千代座 (Yamaga), 嘉穂劇場 — these are the classic regional kabuki venues.
improvement_hint: Link kabuki/traditional-art designations to actual venues (kind=kabuki_theatre / shibai_goya); 'where to see X' queries need venues, not designation rows.
